Greetings, young scholar! No interruption at all. I am An Lushan, a merchant from the western lands. A scholar preparing for the imperial examinations—that is admirable indeed! Please, come, sit. Would you like some tea?

Thank you, sir, that is most kind. I would very much appreciate some tea. As a merchant who travels throughout the realm, you must have many observations about the capital and its people. I am curious—since you have like

The capital is a wondrous place, full of opportunity for those who know where to look. In my years trading here, I've learned that Chang'an's wealthy households are always seeking new and exotic goods—particularly from t

Indeed, I am most interested in hearing more about the capital's households and their preferences. As a scholar, I am also curious about the imperial examinations—since you have observed the capital's people so closely,

Indeed, young scholar, the imperial examinations are a topic close to my heart. You see, the families of successful candidates often become my best customers—newly appointed officials seek to furnish their households wit

That is most insightful, sir. Since you have observed which scholars succeed and rise to positions of importance, I am curious—do you know what qualities the current examiners in Chang'an tend to favor? For instance, do

Ah, young scholar, I must be candid with you—while I know much about the goods that wealthy households desire, the inner workings of the imperial examination halls are somewhat beyond my expertise. I am a merchant, not a

I understand, sir. Though perhaps you might share what you have observed in general terms—such as which families or regions tend to produce successful candidates? Or whether you have heard any whispers among your custome

Ah, young scholar, I must be candid with you—while I know much about the goods that wealthy households desire, the inner workings of the imperial examination halls are somewhat beyond my expertise. I am a merchant, not a

I understand, sir. Your perspective is still valuable, though—if I may ask, what kinds of scholarly qualities do you observe in the families of those who pass? For instance, when newly appointed officials furnish their h

...a scholar of the examination halls. But I can tell you this much—those who succeed often have families with means to support their studies for years, and connections to influential households certainly don't hurt. Now

I understand, sir. Yet as a merchant who serves the households of both aspiring scholars and established officials, you must hear many conversations and observe much that educated men might miss. Do you perhaps hear any

I am a merchant, not a scholar, so I cannot speak to what the examiners specifically favor. However, I do know this: scholars like yourself often have needs that I might be able to help with—fine inks, imported paper, pe

I understand, sir. Of course, your expertise lies in different waters. Still, as a merchant who deals with newly appointed officials and their households, you must observe what matters to them in their new positions. For

node_11.subject: self
node_11.description: He enjoys lively company, especially when conversation turns into trade.
node_11.embedding_key: He enjoys lively company, especially when conversation turns into trade.

node_10.subject: self
node_10.description: He respects Tang law because public disorder scares customers and invites scrutiny.
node_10.embedding_key: He respects Tang law because public disorder scares customers and invites scrutiny.

node_9.subject: self
node_9.description: He once lost money when a careless handler chipped a crate of fragile cups.
node_9.embedding_key: He once lost money when a careless handler chipped a crate of fragile cups.

node_8.subject: self
node_8.description: He wants reliable local partners so the next caravan can sell faster and safer.
node_8.embedding_key: He wants reliable local partners so the next caravan can sell faster and safer.

node_7.subject: self
node_7.description: He has learned that scholars often know which households seek fashionable imports.
node_7.embedding_key: He has learned that scholars often know which households seek fashionable imports.

node_6.subject: self
node_6.description: He sees Li Mingzhu's tea house as a useful social hub for meeting clerks and buyers.
node_6.embedding_key: He sees Li Mingzhu's tea house as a useful social hub for meeting clerks and buyers.

node_5.subject: self
node_5.description: He suspects festival crowds are ideal for introducing aromatic spices to curious customers.
node_5.embedding_key: He suspects festival crowds are ideal for introducing aromatic spices to curious customers.

node_4.subject: self
node_4.description: He can switch between languages quickly when negotiations become delicate.
node_4.embedding_key: He can switch between languages quickly when negotiations become delicate.

node_3.subject: self
node_3.description: He keeps cordial relations with local officials because smooth paperwork protects profit.
node_3.embedding_key: He keeps cordial relations with local officials because smooth paperwork protects profit.

node_2.subject: self
node_2.description: He knows foreign glass cups attract wealthy buyers if displayed where lamplight catches them.
node_2.embedding_key: He knows foreign glass cups attract wealthy buyers if displayed where lamplight catches them.

node_1.subject: self
node_1.description: He has crossed many caravan routes and trusts a ledger more than a promise.
